title: fix(collection): prevent markup parsing
body:
Prevent the request description trying to parse the content with markup.

Fixes #241.

step_plan.summary: Prevent the collection preview from interpreting markup in request descriptions by updating RequestPreview.watch_request to pass a rich.text.Text object (plain text) to the Static widget instead of a raw string.

steps.operation: Render request.description as plain Rich Text to prevent markup parsing
steps.reason: Passing a raw string to Static.update() lets Rich/Textual interpret markup-like sequences (e.g. [b], [i]) which can produce unintended styling or errors. Wrapping the description in rich.text.Text ensures it is treated as plain text and not parsed as markup.
steps.side_effects: Low risk: no API changes; only changes how the preview is rendered. Verify that rich.text.Text is imported at the top of the file (MASCA indicates it already is); if not, add the import. Tests: add or run a UI test that opens a request with markup-like text (e.g. "This contains [b]brackets[/] and should not bold") and assert the literal text appears (no bold). Potential dependents: other components that relied on implicit markup parsing in the preview (unlikely) may see different rendering. Also consider null/None descriptions—if request.description can be None, Text(None) may raise; ensure existing behavior for None is acceptable or coerce with Text(str(request.description or "")).
